page_title: PDF Remediation Services | ADA & Section 508 Compliance

sections.title: Expert PDF Remediation Services for Accessibility Compliance
sections.description:
At Accessibility Innovations, we provide expert PDF remediation services to make your digital documents fully accessible and compliant with ADA, WCAG, and Section 508 standards. Our team specializes in transforming inaccessible PDFs into remediated PDF files that meet legal and usability requirements, reducing your risk of non-compliance and ensuring equal access for all users.
We work with organizations across industries to deliver accessible digital documents through meticulous tagging, structure correction, and PDF accessibility testing. Whether you’re dealing with a single report or thousands of documents, our scalable solutions help you meet compliance regulations and improve user experience for individuals using assistive technology.

image.alt: An illustration of a person holding a lens against a document showing PDF Remediation Services

sections.description:
PDF remediation is the process of converting standard PDF files into accessible formats that can be read and navigated by people with disabilities, especially those using screen readers, keyboard navigation, or other assistive devices.
Remediating a PDF includes applying semantic tags, proper reading order, alt text for images, and language declarations. The goal is to produce a remediated PDF that meets international standards like WCAG 2.1, ADA, and Section 508.
As one of the leading PDF accessibility companies, we also offer document remediation services for forms, scanned documents, reports, and e-books, helping organizations meet the rising demand for digital inclusion.

Inaccessible PDFs can create legal, reputational, and usability challenges. If your PDFs don’t meet accessibility requirements, your organization could be exposed to lawsuits under the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA). Moreover, inaccessible content alienates users who rely on screen readers or cannot use a mouse.

items.title: Legal Risk
items.description: Inaccessible PDFs can lead to lawsuits under laws like the ADA (Americans with Disabilities Act).

items.title: Reputation & Usability
items.description: Poor accessibility can damage your brand’s reputation and exclude users who rely on screen readers or keyboard navigation.

items.title: Inclusive Communication
items.description: Making PDFs accessible ensures content is available to all users, regardless of their abilities.

items.title: Compliance Benefits
items.description: PDF remediation supports regulatory compliance, reduces legal exposure, and reflects ethical communication standards.

items.title: Broad Applicability
items.description: Essential for government agencies, educational institutions, and private businesses.

items.title: Business Value
items.description: Accessibility helps you reach wider audiences, enhance user experience, and build trust.

sections.description:
Investing in PDF accessibility remediation ensures that everyone regardless of ability can access and understand your content. Our PDF compliance services help you avoid legal risks, reach broader audiences, and build trust through inclusive communication.
Whether you’re a government agency, university, or private business, ensuring PDF document accessibility is critical to meeting both regulatory and ethical standards.

sections.title: What Does PDF Remediation Services Include?​

sections.description:
PDF remediation services ensure your PDF documents are accessible to all users, including those who rely on assistive technologies. The process involves multiple steps to ensure compliance with standards such as WCAG, ADA, and Section 508.
Our professional PDF remediation services cover all elements necessary for full accessibility compliance:

items.title: Document Analysis
items.description: Assessing the PDF for accessibility issues, such as missing tags, improperly structured content, and inaccessible elements.

items.title: Tagging and Structuring
items.description: Adding proper tags, headings, and logical structures to make the content readable for screen readers.

items.title: Alt Text for Images
items.description: Providing meaningful alternative text for images and visual elements to convey their purpose.

items.title: Table and Form Remediation
items.description: Ensuring tables and forms are correctly labeled and navigable for assistive technologies.

items.title: Testing and Validation
items.description: Using tools and manual checks to verify the document meets accessibility standards.

sections.description: We use a combination of human expertise and advanced tools to ensure every document is compliant, usable, and accessible.

sections.description: Our clients trust us for reliable, accurate, and high-impact accessibility remediation services that make a real difference.

Our PDF remediation services are trusted by organizations across sectors, including:

No matter your industry, we are committed to helping you achieve accessibility excellence and compliance, creating environments that are welcoming to all individuals. Contact Us today to learn more about how we can help your organization meet its accessibility goals!

items.question: What is a remediated PDF?
items.answer: A remediated PDF is a file that has been modified to meet accessibility standards so it can be read and navigated by screen readers and other assistive technologies.

items.question: Is PDF remediation required by law?
items.answer: Yes, in many jurisdictions like Canada, the U.S., and the EU, organizations are required to ensure digital content is accessible, including PDFs, under laws such as the ACA, ADA, AODA, and Section 508.

items.question: How long does PDF remediation take?
items.answer: Turnaround depends on document length and complexity. We provide fast, scalable options for small and large remediation projects.

items.question: Can scanned PDFs be made accessible?
items.answer: Yes, scanned PDFs can be remediated, though it typically involves OCR processing before accessibility work can begin.

items.question: Do you offer a PDF remediation platform or manual services?
items.answer: We offer both platform-based solutions and expert-led remediation services depending on your needs.

items.question: Do you test with screen readers?
items.answer: Yes, every remediated PDF is tested using real screen readers and accessibility tools to ensure full compliance.
